faculty.name: Dr. Neenam Shetty
faculty.title: Vice Principal – Commerce
faculty.bio: Dr. Neenam Shetty is Vice Principal – Commerce at St. Xavier's College, Mumbai.
faculty.quote: Shaping the future of commerce education through academic excellence.

faculty.name: Dr. Sanjay Parab
faculty.title: Associate Professor
faculty.bio: Dr. Sanjay Parab, Associate Professor, holds multiple qualifications including M.Com., M.A., M.Phil., Ph.D., LL.M., and FCS, with over 21 years of teaching experience. He has a keen research interest in Corporate Governance, Business Administration, and Corporate Finance, and was a university topper in Company Law during his LLB.
achievements: M.Com., M.A., M.Phil., Ph.D., LL.M., FCS
faculty.quote: Excellence in corporate governance and finance education drives sustainable business growth.

faculty.name: Fr. Ambrose Machado SJ
faculty.title: Head of Department – BAF
faculty.bio: Faculty at BAF department in St. Xaviers College

faculty.name: Ms. Kamalika Ray
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.bio: Ms. Kamalika Ray, Assistant Professor, holds an M.Com. in Accountancy, PGDBA (Finance), EPG in Data Analytics, and is a Certified TRP, currently pursuing a Ph.D. With 3 years of teaching experience, her research interests include Accountancy and Finance, ESG, and Personal Finance.
achievements: EPG in Data Analytics, Certified TRP
faculty.quote: Empowering students with data-driven financial insights and sustainable investment practices.

faculty.name: Mr. Pratik Purohit
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.bio: Mr. Pratik Purohit, Assistant Professor, holds an M.Com. in Accountancy, PGDFM, and M.Phil., and is currently pursuing a Ph.D. With 6 years of teaching experience, his research interests lie in Accountancy and Finance, Business Policy and Administration, and Management.
faculty.quote: Integrating theoretical knowledge with practical management approaches creates well-rounded financial professionals.

faculty.name: Mr. Lloyd Serrao
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.bio: Mr. Lloyd Serrao, Assistant Professor, is a C.S., L.L.B., and Associate Member of ICSI with over five years of experience in corporate filings, FEMA, IBC, and compliances. With 2 years of teaching experience, his research interests include Finance, Corporate and Commercial Laws, and Banking.
achievements: C.S., L.L.B., Associate Member of ICSI
Over 5 years experience in corporate filings
Expert in FEMA, IBC, and compliances
faculty.quote: Understanding legal frameworks is essential for sound financial decision-making and corporate compliance.

leadership.name: Yash Shinde
leadership.title: Chairperson – The Finance Symposium (TFS)
leadership.bio: Yash Shinde is a driven student-leader and the Chairperson of The Finance Symposium (TFS) at St. Xavier's College, Mumbai. He curates strategic initiatives that connect finance, innovation, and enterprise through student-led forums and industry collaborations.
leadership.quote: Leadership is about driving impact, fostering innovation, and building collaborative platforms for the future.

leadership.name: Pushti Jain
leadership.title: Vice Chairperson – Networking, The Finance Symposium (TFS)
leadership.bio: Pushti Jain serves as the Vice Chairperson – Networking at The Finance Symposium (TFS), leading strategic outreach, alumni networks, and industry relations at St. Xavier's College, Mumbai.
achievements: Vice Chairperson – Networking, The Finance Symposium (TFS)
leadership.quote: Connecting people and fostering collaborative partnerships to bridge academia and industry.

leadership.name: Eesha Teoti
leadership.title: Vice Chairperson – Management, The Finance Symposium (TFS)
leadership.bio: Eesha Teoti is the Vice Chairperson – Management at The Finance Symposium (TFS), overseeing internal operations, event management, and team coordination at St. Xavier's College, Mumbai.
achievements: Vice Chairperson – Management, The Finance Symposium (TFS)
leadership.quote: Ensuring flawless execution and strong operational systems to support organizational excellence.
